title: Algerian Vegan Stuffed Mushrooms
description: A flavorful and aromatic Algerian-inspired dish featuring stuffed mushrooms with a mix of spices and cheese alternatives. Perfect for a satisfying vegan meal.
instructions: Clean and prepare the mushrooms by removing the stems and scooping out the insides.
In a bowl, mix together cooked rice, Algerian spice mix, and brie cheese alternative.
Stuff each mushroom cap with the rice mixture, dividing it evenly.
Drizzle olive oil over the stuffed mushrooms and season with salt and pepper.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the mushrooms are tender and the filling is heated through.
